title: Enter valid phone number
test_steps: Navigate to the 'Phone for Checkout' screen. | Tap on the text input field labeled 'Phone'. | Enter the phone number '123-456-7890'. | Verify that the phone number is correctly entered.
expected_result: The phone number '123-456-7890' is displayed in the input field.

title: Enter invalid phone number
test_steps: Navigate to the 'Phone for Checkout' screen. | Tap on the text input field labeled 'Phone'. | Enter the phone number '123-456-789'. | Verify that an error message is displayed indicating an invalid phone number.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating an invalid phone number.

title: Clear phone number input
test_steps: Navigate to the 'Phone for Checkout' screen. | Tap on the text input field labeled 'Phone'. | Enter the phone number '123-456-7890'. | Tap on the input field again to clear the text. | Verify that the input field is empty.

title: Navigation to checkout
test_steps: Navigate to the 'Phone for Checkout' screen. | Enter a valid phone number '123-456-7890'. | Tap on the 'Next' button to navigate to the checkout screen. | Verify that the user is redirected to the checkout screen.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the checkout screen.

title: Input field accessibility
test_steps: Navigate to the 'Phone for Checkout' screen. | Tap on the text input field labeled 'Phone'. | Verify that the input field is accessible and can be interacted with.
expected_result: The input field is accessible and can be interacted with.

title: Input field usability
test_steps: Navigate to the 'Phone for Checkout' screen. | Tap on the text input field labeled 'Phone'. | Enter a valid phone number '123-456-7890'. | Verify that the input field is easy to use and does not have any usability issues.
expected_result: The input field is easy to use and does not have any usability issues.

title: Data persistence
test_steps: Navigate to the 'Phone for Checkout' screen. | Enter a valid phone number '123-456-7890'. | Navigate to the home screen. | Return to the 'Phone for Checkout' screen. | Verify that the phone number '123-456-7890' is still present in the input field.
expected_result: The phone number '123-456-7890' is still present in the input field.
